requirements.full_sentence:
If not managed effectively, credit risk may have ramifications for a range
of other risk categories too.
requirements.object: range of other risk categories too

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative
Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Credit Risk Management) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
requirements.object: upon issuance

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Rural Co-operative Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as a 'RCB').
requirements.object: Co-operative Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'RCBs' and individually as a 'RCB')

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, rural co-operative banks shall mean State Co-operative Banks
(StCBs) and Central Co-operative Banks (CCBs), as defined in the National Bank
for Agriculture and Rural Development Act, 1981.
requirements.object: (StCBs) and Central Co-operative Banks (CCBs), as defined in the National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development Act

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) 'Cash credit (CC)' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed an advance
up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, book
debts, standing crops, etc.
requirements.object: which a customer is allowed an advance up to the credit limit against the security by way of hypothecation / pledge of goods, b

requirements.full_sentence:
The
outstanding amount is repayable on demand.]
2[(ia) 'Contract or arrangement' shall have the same meaning as specified in Section
188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: as specified in Section 188(1)(a) to (g) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(ib) 'Control' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the
Companies Act, 2013.]
3[(ii) 'Current Account' shall mean a form of demand deposit account wherefrom
withdrawals are allowed any number of times depending upon the balance in the account
or up to a particular agreed amount and shall also be deemed to include other deposit
accounts which are neither Savings nor Term deposit account.]
4[(iia) 'Director of a RCB' shall have the same meaning as defined in Explanation (b) to
Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act 1949 and would include a nominee director and
an independent director
(iib) 'Entity' shall mean a 'person' other than an individual and a Hindu Undivided Family.
requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 2(27) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(iic) 'Key Managerial Personnel (KMP)' of a RCB shall mean all employees one level
below the Board and any person designated as such by the Board.
requirements.object: level below the Board and any person designated as such by the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
(iid) 'Lending' in the context of a related party shall mean extending funded or/ and non-
fund-based credit facilities to related parties.
requirements.object: and non- fund-based credit facilities to related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
While investments in debt instruments of
related parties shall be covered for this purpose, equity investments shall be excluded.]
5[(iii) 'Overdraft (OD)' shall mean a facility, under which a customer is allowed to draw an
agreed sum (credit limit) in excess of credit balance in their account.
requirements.object: purpose, equity investments shall be excluded

requirements.full_sentence:
The overdraft facility
may be secured (against fixed / term deposits and other securities, like small saving
instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc.) or clean (i.e.
requirements.object: / term deposits and other securities, like small saving instruments, surrender value of insurance policies, etc

requirements.full_sentence:
The overdraft facility might be granted on their current account, savings
deposits account or temporary overdraft on credit accounts.]
6[(iv) 'Person' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 3 (23) of Part
I of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC), 2016.
requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 3 (23) of Part I of Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (IBC), 2016

requirements.full_sentence:
(v) 'Personal Loan' shall have the same meaning as defined under Banking Statistics
(Harmonised Definitions).
requirements.object: as defined under Banking Statistics (Harmonised Definitions)

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) 'Promoter' shall have the same meaning as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of the
Companies Act, 2013.
requirements.object: as assigned to it under Section 2(69) of the Companies Act, 2013

requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) 'Reciprocally Related Person' means an individual who is either (a) a director
(excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the Government or RBI
or a statutory body) of another Co-operative bank or (b) relatives of such directors or (c)
firms/companies in which such reciprocally related persons have interest/substantial
interest.
requirements.object: either (a) a director (excluding independent director/ nominee director appointed by the Government or RBI or a statutory body) o

requirements.full_sentence:
(viii) Related Party' with respect to a RCB shall mean a related person, a reciprocally
related person, or any of the following entities:
requirements.object: a reciprocally related person, or any of the following entities:

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, nothing in sub-clause (e) above shall apply in cases where the authority to
nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement.
requirements.object: the authority to nominate a director arises exclusively from a lending or financing arrangement

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, nothing in sub-clause (f) above shall apply to the advice, directions
or instructions given in a professional capacity.
requirements.object: directions or instructions given in a professional capacity

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, Government of India / State Government-owned or controlled
entities shall not be treated as related parties to a government-owned bank just by virtue
of the fact that the Government has the common ownership or control of such entities.
requirements.object: parties to a government-owned bank just by virtue of the fact that the Government has the common ownership or control of such en

requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) 'Related Person' with respect to a RCB shall mean a person, and the relatives of such
a person, where the person:
requirements.object: the relatives of such a person

requirements.full_sentence:
(x) 'Relative' with regard to a natural person shall have the same meaning as defined in
Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein.
requirements.object: as defined in Section 2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and rules framed therein

requirements.full_sentence:
(xii) 'Substantial interest' shall have the same meaning assigned to it under Clause (ne)
of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.]
7[(2)] All expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-
enactment thereto or in other relevant regulations issued by the Reserve Bank or
Glossary of Terms published by Reserve Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the
case may be.
requirements.object: assigned to it under Clause (ne) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
8[An RCB shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk
Management.
requirements.object: comprehensive Board approved policy on Credit Risk Management

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall, inter alia, cover aspects related to lending to related
parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and maintenance of
cash credit accounts, current accounts and overdraft accounts.
requirements.object: aspects related to lending to related parties, valuation of properties including empanelment of valuers and maintenance of cash cr

requirements.full_sentence:
Credit assessments carried out by a bank shall suitably factor in the possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events.]
9Inserted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Credit Risk Management) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
requirements.object: possible impact of calamities on borrowers who may be impacted by such events

requirements.full_sentence:
Advances to Banks' Directors
In terms of Section 20(1)(b) read with Section 56 of the BR Act, an RCB shall not
enter into any commitment for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of -
(1) any of its directors,
(2) any firm in which any of its directors is interested as partner, manager, employee
or guarantor, or
(3) any company not being a subsidiary of the RCB or a company registered under
Section 8 of the Companies Act, 2013, or a Government company of which or the
subsidiary or the holding company of which any of the directors of the RCB is a
director, managing agent, manager, employee or guarantor or in which he holds
substantial interest, or
(4) any individual in respect of whom any of its directors is a partner or guarantor.
requirements.object: for granting any loan or advance to or on behalf of - (1) any of its directors, (2) any firm in which any of its directors i

requirements.full_sentence:
(1) For the purposes of this Chapter of these Directions, co-operative entities, being
distinct legal structures governed by their own statutes, shall not be construed as
either a 'company' or a 'firm'.
requirements.object: a 'company' or a 'firm'
facility on or after its contracted maturity or renewal date

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, the credit facilities mentioned at sub-paras (iv) and (v) above shall be
subject to the prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals
in Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions,
2025 and Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Concentration Risk
Management) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: prudential ceilings and norms prescribed for various loans to individuals in Reserve Bank of India (Rural Co-operative Banks - Credi

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that, the purpose of loans mentioned at sub-paras (iv) and (v) above
shall not be for investment in financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such
loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees.
requirements.object: financial assets and the interest rate charged on all such loans shall not be lower than the rate charged to the employees

requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his/her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent
or higher value.
requirements.object: cash collateral of equivalent or higher value

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposure arising on account
of derivative transactions.]
requirements.object: not be mandatory in exposure arising on account of derivative transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
In terms of Section 20A(2) read with Section 56 of the Act ibid, any remission made
in contravention of the provisions of sub-section (1) above shall be void and of no
effect.
requirements.object: no effect

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall insist that borrower Units with Negative Net worth / other
irregularities draw and implement a time-bound realistic plan for bringing
themselves back to normalcy / viability in operations.
requirements.object: with Negative Net worth / other irregularities draw and implement a time-bound realistic plan for bringing themselves back

requirements.full_sentence:
RCBs shall monitor such
plans closely, and pending such revival, any fresh finance shall be subject to closer
scrutiny and case by case review/approval by the Board / Competent Authority.
requirements.object: and pending such revival, any fresh finance shall be subject to closer scrutiny and case by case review/approval by the Bo

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, any credit facility to such units shall be subject to obtention of Government
Default Guarantee for non-credit cooperative societies /Government owned units,
and against adequate collateral security for the units outside the co-operative fold.
requirements.object: of Government Default Guarantee for non-credit cooperative societies /Government owned units, and against adequate collateral

conditions:
where State Government's budgetary support is
available
requirements.full_sentence:
Considering their resource pattern, priorities and the expertise available, an RCB
shall not grant credit facilities for certain activities / institutions, such as real estate,
housing (except to the extent permitted by Reserve Bank), infrastructure, power
schemes / projects especially where State Government's budgetary support is
available, and NBFCs.
requirements.object: certain activities / institutions, such as real estate, housing (except to the extent permitted by Reserve Bank), infrastr

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB, in view of their primary role of lending for activities related to agriculture
and rural development, shall desist from financing the commercial real estate
(CRE) sector.
requirements.object: commercial real estate (CRE) sector

requirements.full_sentence:
As regards the credit facilities already extended to this sector, it
should be ensured that such exposures are well secured and adequate
provisioning made, wherever required, as per the existing prudential guidelines.
requirements.object: exposures are well secured and adequate provisioning made

requirements.full_sentence:
It
may also be ensured that the credit facilities are not renewed.
requirements.object: the credit facilities are not renewed

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall not extend any financial assistance (including working capital funds)
to NBFCs.
requirements.object: (including working capital funds) to NBFCs

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall continue to review the quality of their lending to non-credit
cooperative societies / units outside the cooperative fold and individuals, on a
quarterly basis and submit a Memorandum thereon to their Board.
requirements.object: quality of their lending to non-credit cooperative societies / units outside the cooperative fold and individuals, on a quarter

conditions:
if any, in the
operations of the unit or any other problems faced by the unit
requirements.full_sentence:
Such a review
may cover, inter alia, details of sectoral / sub-sectoral credit limits / loans
sanctioned, comments on operations on the major accounts on adequacy of
margin, utilisation of the limit, end use of credit, irregularities, if any, in the
operations of the unit or any other problems faced by the unit, etc., together with
the RCB's sectoral exposure and any other relevant issue.
requirements.object: of sectoral / sub-sectoral credit limits / loans sanctioned, comments on operations on the major accounts on adequacy of margin, utilisation of the limit, end use of credit, irregularities

requirements.full_sentence:
A copy of such review
notes may be submitted to the relevant Regional Office of NABARD.
requirements.object: relevant Regional Office of NABARD

requirements.full_sentence:
In the case
of the CCBs, a copy may also be given to the concerned StCB.
requirements.object: the concerned StCB

requirements.full_sentence:
The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
bank.
requirements.object: of ensuring that suitable mechanisms are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties b

requirements.full_sentence:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of a bank, as required in terms of
the extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
requirements.object: to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall
prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.
requirements.object: safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
The policy shall also have specific provisions for lending to 'specified employees'
of the bank and their relatives.
requirements.object: for lending to 'specified employees' of the bank and their relatives
part of the whistleblowing mechanism, encourage employees to communicate confidentially and without the risk of reprisal, legitimate concerns

requirements.full_sentence: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.
requirements.object: loans towards related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a
group of related parties.
requirements.object: to a single related party and a group of related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure
limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: prudential exposure limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
RCB shall not undertake any lending transaction with the relatives of directors
except credit facility fully secured by government securities, life insurance policies
or fixed deposit standing in their own name.
requirements.object: with the relatives of directors except credit facility fully secured by government securities, life insurance polici

requirements.full_sentence:
RCBs shall not undertake any lending transaction with the firms / companies /
concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding companies thereof, in which the
relatives of directors are interested, or have given surety / guarantee or hold
substantial interest or are in control of the company / firm.
requirements.object: with the firms / companies / concerns, as well as subsidiaries / holding companies thereof, in which the relatives o

requirements.full_sentence:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of provisions of this
Chapter and Chapter III of these Directions, or which have been permitted under
power exercised by the Reserve Bank under clause (a) of the Explanation under
sub-section 4 of Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, except (i) credit
facilities fully secured by cash or liquid securities and (ii) inter-bank loans, shall be
subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit policy of the RCB, which shall
not be higher than the following ceilings:
Asset Size of the RCB Materiality Threshold Ceilings
>₹10,000 crore ₹75 lakh
₹3,000 crore - ₹10,000 crore ₹50 lakh
Upto ₹3,000 crore ₹25 lakh
16J.
requirements.object: of this Chapter and Chapter III of these Directions, or which have been permitted under power exercised by the Reserve Bank under clause (a) of the Explanation under sub-section 4 of Section 20 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loans to related parties as
per the RCB's policy.
requirements.object: of loans to related parties as per the RCB's policy

requirements.full_sentence:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned by Board of
the RCB.
requirements.object: of the RCB

requirements.full_sentence:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
requirements.object: and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

requirements.full_sentence:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
requirements.object: and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

requirements.full_sentence:
RCB shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loan sanctioned by the bank to such related persons and related parties.
requirements.object: suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as w

requirements.full_sentence:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.
requirements.object: or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re

requirements.full_sentence:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
thereof shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
requirements.object: Audit Committee of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the bank or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
requirements.object: lending to related party

requirements.full_sentence:
Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in
supervisory and enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve
Bank.
requirements.object: enforcement actions as deemed appropriate by the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
These actions may include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of
full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic
audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as
deemed fit.]
requirements.object: penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on
valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:
requirements.object: following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:

requirements.full_sentence:
Policy for valuation of properties
(1) An RCB shall have a Board approved policy in place for valuation of properties
including collaterals accepted for their exposures.
requirements.object: policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures

requirements.full_sentence: (2) The valuation shall be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i.e.
requirements.object: qualified independent valuers i

requirements.full_sentence: the valuer shall not have a direct or indirect interest.
requirements.object: indirect interest

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) An RCB shall obtain minimum two Independent Valuation Reports for properties
valued at ₹50 crore or above.
requirements.object: Valuation Reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above

requirements.full_sentence:
Revaluation of bank's own properties
In addition to the above, an RCB may keep the following aspects in view while
formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties:
(1) As an RCB is permitted to include revaluation reserves as part of Capital in terms
of Reserve Bank of India (Rural Cooperative Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, it is necessary that revaluation reserves represent
true appreciation in the market value of the properties and banks have in place a
comprehensive policy for revaluation of fixed assets owned by them.
requirements.object: in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) As an RCB is permitted to include revaluation

requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy
shall inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation,
maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of
revaluation, depreciation policy for such assets, policy for sale of such revalued
assets etc.
requirements.object: for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) As the revaluation shall reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the
frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in
the prices of the assets in the past.
requirements.object: the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, any change in the method of
depreciation shall reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the
future economic benefits of the assets.
requirements.object: the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall adhere to these principles
meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation.
requirements.object: meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation

requirements.full_sentence:
Policy for Empanelment of Independent valuers
(1) An RCB shall have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and
maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'.
requirements.object: empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'

requirements.full_sentence: (2) An RCB may prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers.
requirements.object: for empanelment of valuers

requirements.full_sentence: Different qualifications may be prescribed for different classes of assets (e.g.
requirements.object: classes of assets (e

requirements.full_sentence:
While prescribing the
qualification, an RCB shall take into consideration the qualifications prescribed
under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957.
requirements.object: qualifications prescribed under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957

requirements.full_sentence:
An RCB shall also be guided by the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.
requirements.object: the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India

requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry.
requirements.object: the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry

requirements.full_sentence:
Current Accounts, Cash Credit Accounts (CC), and Overdraft Accounts (OD) may
all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating
to credit monitoring by the lenders.
requirements.object: transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (1): 'Banking System' for the purpose of this Chapter shall include
Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional
Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative Banks and Rural
Co-operative Banks (State Co-operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks).
requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (2): 'Exposure' for the purpose of this Chapter means the sum of all
sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the
borrower from the banking system.
requirements.object: sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of customers to whom the exposure of the banking system is ₹10 crore or
more:
(1) A bank may maintain current accounts or OD accounts as per the needs of the
customer provided that the bank has either:
Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current
account or OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the
accountholder.
requirements.object: Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current account or OD account used primarily for receip

requirements.full_sentence:
Restricted payments / cash outflows from such account shall be
subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 25F of these Directions.
requirements.object: conditions outlined in paragraph 25F of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
With a view to ensuring credit discipline, lenders may include additional covenants
as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers.
requirements.object: per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the
customer, without any restriction under this Chapter.
requirements.object: facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this Chapter

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank may maintain current account or OD account without any restriction in
cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less
than ₹10 crore.
requirements.object: OD account without any restriction in cases where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer is less tha

requirements.full_sentence:
Funds credited into a collection account shall be remitted within two working days
of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained
with any bank in the banking system and designated by the borrower for this purpose
(hereinafter referred to as 'designated account' in this Chapter).
requirements.object: working days of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained with any bank in the banking s

requirements.full_sentence:
Any disbursement of
overdraft limit from an OD account, which is in the nature of a collection account, shall
be through the designated account only.
requirements.object: account only

conditions: Provided that statutory dues such as taxes
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that statutory dues such as taxes, and dues, if any, to the bank maintaining
the collection account may be debited before remitting the funds.
requirements.object: taxes, and dues

requirements.full_sentence:
The restrictions placed in terms of paragraph 25D(1) of these Directions shall not
be applicable to the accounts mentioned below:
(1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) and notifications issued thereunder, including accounts mandated
for ensuring compliance under the FEMA framework.
requirements.object: accounts mentioned below: (1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 (FEMA) and notificat

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that banks operating the above-mentioned exempted accounts shall
ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted /
specified purposes.
requirements.object: such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes

requirements.full_sentence:
Surplus funds, if any, in such accounts shall be remitted to
the designated account.
requirements.object: designated account

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of ensuring ongoing compliance with this Chapter, all banks shall
monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least
once every half-year.
requirements.object: them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year

requirements.full_sentence:
then the bank shall notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within
one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must either
be converted to a collection account or closed.
requirements.object: promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe

requirements.full_sentence:
The conversion or closure process, as
the case may be, shall be completed within three months of observing such
ineligibility.
requirements.object: months of observing such ineligibility

requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts opened in terms of these Directions shall be appropriately flagged in the
bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate
effective monitoring.
requirements.object: the bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
Banks maintaining multiple accounts for a borrower shall ensure
that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the
borrower level as also at the account level.
requirements.object: and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for
transactions related to their authorised business or activities.
requirements.object: utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities

requirements.full_sentence:
These accounts shall
not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third-
party transactions.
requirements.object: be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator
to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so.
requirements.object: authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so

requirements.full_sentence:
However, such activities
shall strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall
not extend beyond that scope.
requirements.object: the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope

requirements.full_sentence:
Any account that has been permitted to carry out such
third-party transactions shall be appropriately flagged in the bank's CBS to ensure
clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring.
requirements.object: the bank's CBS to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by
the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage
in such activities through accounts maintained with them.
requirements.object: who is not licensed or authorised by the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i

requirements.full_sentence:
Robust monitoring systems shall be implemented to detect the above prohibited
usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction
volumes, frequent pass-through activities, or inconsistencies between the
accountholder's stated line of business and transactions carried out through the
account.
requirements.object: the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas

requirements.full_sentence:
Term loans sanctioned by the bank shall preferably be remitted directly to the
intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use, where such beneficiary
is identifiable, rather than routing the funds through the borrower's account.]
requirements.object: to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines
already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
